goal: Refine the Yuchu character stand asset so the encyclopedia shows a clean single-character cutout with the background removed, while preserving the character's white clothing/details.
constraints: Do not change any code or UI components.
Only edit the Yuchu stand asset and the task file.
Preserve character body, face, clothing, props, and intentional white highlights on the character.
Remove only background remnants so the result reads as a single transparent-background figure.
deliverables: public/assets/chars/stand/yuchu.png is cleaned into a single-character transparent cutout.
No unrelated character assets are modified.
